headline: UBS opens world's largest AI Transformation Factory in Singapore
summary: UBS has opened what it calls the world's largest dedicated AI Transformation Factory in Singapore, a center housing 2,000 engineers and data scientists focused exclusively on building and deploying AI tools across the bank's global wealth management operations. The factory operates on a product-at-scale model — each AI capability is built once and deployed globally across all UBS client-facing and internal platforms. Singapore was chosen for its regulatory clarity, talent pool, and proximity to the bank's fastest-growing Asia-Pacific book. The first five products from the factory include AI-powered client meeting preparation, portfolio risk analysis, and automated regulatory reporting.

key_stat.label: Engineers in UBS's Singapore AI Factory
